title: fix: check npipe when executing podman compose on wsl vm
body:
Closes #20373 

Add a check on the npipe if podman compose is run against a wsl vm and return the npipe path

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```
fix podman compose command not working with wsl
```

Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
@lstocchi Please repush now that you set the [no new tests needed] flag
Restarted three tests - looked like network flakes?
reminder for whoever merges this, be sure to cherry-pick it back

couple things for consideration ... i want @vrothberg to look at this before it merges.  @vrothberg if you are happy with it, feel free to merge without my comments being addressed

this makes me wonder about system connections and its future as well as whether this should be part of the provider interface so its hidden from cmdline stuff?

> this makes me wonder about system connections and its future as well as whether this should be part of the provider interface so its hidden from cmdline stuff?

I don't understand in detail what you mean but keeping connections around is needed for the non-machine remote case.
